_config_guide.token: Apni Discord bot token yahan paste karein
_config_guide.prefix: Bot commands ka prefix (optional, future use ke liye)
_config_guide.monitored_channels: Channel IDs ki list jahan bot images monitor karega
_config_guide.watermark_path: Watermark image ka path (relative ya absolute)
_config_guide.watermark_size_percent: Watermark ka size original image ke percentage mein (1-100)
_config_guide.watermark_position: Options: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, center
_config_guide.watermark_padding: Watermark aur image edge ke beech space (pixels mein)
_config_guide.delete_original: Original message ko delete karna hai (true/false)
_config_guide.delete_delay: Original message delete karne se pehle delay (seconds mein)
_config_guide.show_original_author: Embed mein original poster ka naam dikhana hai (false for just WARRIOR ON TOP)
_config_guide.send_error_messages: Error messages channel mein send karne hain (true/false)
